# objectForKeyedSubscript(_:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the value of the specified JavaScript property in the context’s global object, allowing subscript getter syntax.

## Declaration

```swift
func objectForKeyedSubscript(_ key: Any!) -> JSValue!
```

## Parameters

- **key**: The name of a JavaScript property in the context’s global JavaScript object.

## Return Value

The JavaScript property named by `key`, or `nil` if no such field or function exists.

## Discussion

This method first constructs a [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue] object from the `key` parameter, then uses that value in JavaScript to look up the name of a property in the context’s global object.

## Accessing JavaScript global state with subscripts

- **setObject(_:forKeyedSubscript:)**: Sets the specified JavaScript property of the context’s global object, allowing subscript setter syntax.
